name: Slack Profile
description: Slack user identity and active workspace metadata. Captures who is exporting and which workspace the export came from.

user.description: Slack user record for the person running the export.

realName.description: Full real name from the user's Slack profile.

displayName.description: Display name shown in the workspace.

email.description: Profile email address, when visible to the user.

tz.description: User's IANA timezone identifier, e.g. America/Los_Angeles.

tzLabel.description: Friendly timezone label, e.g. Pacific Daylight Time.

isAdmin.description: Whether the user is a workspace admin.

isOwner.description: Whether the user is a workspace owner.

isBot.description: Whether the Slack record is a bot account (typically false for human exporters).

workspace.description: Identity of the Slack workspace this export came from.

enterpriseId.description: Enterprise Grid id, if this workspace is part of an Enterprise Grid org.

icon.description: Slack-provided team icon object with image URLs at multiple sizes.

bootSource.description: Where the API token was sourced from at runtime (e.g. TS.boot_data, inline-script).

historyWindowDays.description: Optional message history depth used for this run, in days. Null means all-time.
